summary: Productionize the Ppomppu OTT bot for free-tier/low-RAM cloud deployment (512 MB-1 GB). Covers memory capping, Docker multi-stage image, systemd hardening, SQLite PRAGMAs, activity log rotation, release pruning, health endpoint enrichment, and NL webhook LLM routing. Existing ops/ scripts and remote-ops contracts provide the foundation.

storage.activity_log: JSON file at ACTIVITY_LOG_PATH (currently 1.4 MB, growing unbounded)
storage.artifact_dir: artifacts/ — debug screenshots, traces, competitor intel

technical_context.testing: Vitest (83 tests green), Playwright integration tests
technical_context.target_platform: Linux server (AWS EC2 t3.micro or Oracle Cloud Free ARM)
constraints: Network-attached storage for DB and logs

spec_first.evidence: This plan derived from cloud_deployment_optimization_guide.md and remote-ops contracts already in .planning/spec-kit/specs/

contracts_over_prose.evidence: All env var contracts in .agent/contracts/env.contract.json. Runtime contracts in remote-ops.runtime.contract.json.

semantic_intent_required.evidence: Spec includes user stories with acceptance scenarios, edge cases, and success criteria

strict_validation.evidence: Env validation in config/env.ts with JSON schema at .planning/spec-kit/manifest/schemas/env.schema.json

multi_forum_ready.evidence: Deployment optimization is forum-agnostic; no forum-specific logic

governance_checks.secrets_in_env_only: pass — PPOMPPU_USER_PW loaded via SSM, never in source
governance_checks.require_declared_entry_points: pass — entry points: server.ts, bot.ts, ops/deploy/*.sh
governance_checks.require_preconditions: pass — preconditions documented in spec per user story
governance_checks.require_idempotency: pass — deploy script idempotent (symlink swap), GC idempotent (age-based prune)
governance_checks.require_failure_policy: pass — fail-closed on missing env vars, OOM restart via systemd

source_changes.lib/sharedBrowser.ts: Reduce --js-flags max-old-space-size from 2048 to 100 for low-RAM hosts
source_changes.server.ts: Add periodic GC interval (6h), static cache headers, resource metrics on /api/health/resources
source_changes.config/env.ts: Add NODE_ENV validation, shm_size env var
source_changes.lib/resourceMonitor.ts: Add activity_log.json entry cap (5000) to GC logic
source_changes.routes/api/nl.ts: Add LLM function calling schema and dispatch router (optional, P3)
source_changes.ops/systemd/marketing-automation.service: Add memory limit, restart policy, env loading from SSM
source_changes.Dockerfile: New file — multi-stage build (frontend build → server deps → runtime)
source_changes.docker-compose.yml: New file — shm_size: 256mb, volume mounts, healthcheck

execution_phases.goal: Stabilize memory footprint and prevent OOM on 512 MB hosts
tasks: T-001: Reduce CHROMIUM_LAUNCH_ARGS --js-flags from 2048 to 100
T-002: Add --max-old-space-size=400 to server.ts startup command
T-003: Verify --disable-dev-shm-usage present (already in sharedBrowser.ts — confirm, no change)
T-004: Add Docker .dockerignore file
T-005: Add systemd memory limit to marketing-automation.service
T-006: Run 2-hour stress test, verify RSS stays under 400 MB
execution_phases.acceptance: Bot runs 2 hours on constrained memory without OOM. RSS stable.
execution_phases.model_recommendation: Sonnet 4.6 — straightforward config changes, no creative reasoning needed

execution_phases.goal: Reproducible, portable container image with minimal footprint
tasks: T-007: Create multi-stage Dockerfile (frontend build → server deps → runtime)
T-008: Create docker-compose.yml with shm_size: 256mb, volume mounts
T-009: Add non-root USER in Docker runtime stage
T-010: Add dumb-init for PID 1 signal forwarding
T-011: Build and verify image size < 800 MB
T-012: docker compose up -d, verify /api/health 200
execution_phases.acceptance: Docker image builds under 800 MB, container starts healthy, Chromium launches.
execution_phases.model_recommendation: Sonnet 4.6 — Dockerfile is template-driven, verify system deps for Playwright Chromium

execution_phases.goal: Atomic deploys, rollback path, persistent volumes for logs and browser profiles
tasks: T-013: Add release pruning to deploy-release.sh (keep 5, rm oldest)
T-014: Verify ACTIVITY_LOG_PATH and BOT_PROFILE_DIR use /opt/marketing-automation/shared/
T-015: Add pre-deploy dry-run migration check (if applicable)
T-016: Add rollback verification to rollback-release.sh
T-017: Document deploy + rollback runbook in .planning/cloud-deployment-optimization/deploy-runbook.md
execution_phases.acceptance: Deploy swaps symlink, health check passes. Rollback restores previous release in < 60s.
execution_phases.model_recommendation: Sonnet 4.6 — Shell script modifications, well-defined deploy pattern from existing ops/

execution_phases.goal: Prevent SQLite lock crashes on NAS, cap activity log growth
tasks: T-018: Add SQLite PRAGMAs (WAL, synchronous=NORMAL, busy_timeout=5000, cache_size=-16000, mmap_size=128MB, temp_store=MEMORY)
T-019: Cap activity_log.json at 5000 entries in lib/resourceMonitor.ts GC
T-020: Verify activity log read latency < 100 ms with 5000 entries
execution_phases.acceptance: SQLite handles concurrent reads without lock errors. Activity log capped at 5000 entries.
execution_phases.model_recommendation: Sonnet 4.6 — PRAGMA application is straightforward; GC logic in existing resourceMonitor.ts

execution_phases.goal: Expose resource metrics, set up uptime monitoring, periodic GC
tasks: T-021: Add periodic GC (6h interval) to server.ts
T-022: Enrich /api/health/resources with heapUsed, artifactDirSizeMb, activityLogSizeKb
T-023: Add express.static cache headers (maxAge: 7d) for production
T-024: Document UptimeRobot + Slack alert setup in runbook
execution_phases.acceptance: /api/health/resources returns resource metrics. GC runs periodically. Static assets cached.
execution_phases.model_recommendation: Sonnet 4.6 — Existing resourceMonitor.ts has metrics; wire them into health route

execution_phases.goal: Natural language Slack control via LLM function calling
tasks: T-025: Define tool schema for NL router (get_status, set_gap_threshold, trigger_observer, trigger_publish, set_dry_run, pause/resume_scheduler)
T-026: Implement Gemini Flash function calling in routes/api/nl.ts
T-027: Add HMAC verification for Slack webhook
T-028: Add rate limiting (5 req/min) to NL endpoint
T-029: Test with real Slack messages via ngrok or deploy
execution_phases.acceptance: Slack message 'set gap to 5' updates gap threshold. HMAC verification rejects unsigned requests.
execution_phases.model_recommendation: Opus 4.7 — LLM function calling schema design, error handling for malformed responses, Slack signature verification

session_boundaries.session_format: Each session operates independently. Session handovers in .agent/session-handovers/ contain: previous session output, current task assignment, preconditions to verify before starting.
session_boundaries.handover_trigger: When a phase's acceptance criteria are met, create session handover file before starting next phase
session_boundaries.state_persistence: All session state persisted via: (1) git commits with descriptive messages, (2) test suite results, (3) session handover JSON in .agent/session-handovers/

complexity_tracking.notes: No constitution violations. All changes are additive or config-tuning within existing architecture.

risk_assessment.risk: Chromium --js-flags=100 too restrictive for complex pages
risk_assessment.mitigation: Test against ppomppu board page; if V8 OOM, increase to 150. The 2048 flag was overprovisioned for low-RAM hosts.

risk_assessment.risk: Docker Playwright Chromium system deps may differ across base images
risk_assessment.mitigation: Use npx playwright install chromium --with-deps in Dockerfile build stage; Alpine vs Debian may need different packages

risk_assessment.risk: activity_log.json cap at 5000 may lose historical data
risk_assessment.mitigation: Cap is for GC; historical data should migrate to SQLite table (out of scope, tracked as future work)
